Container.Name: Vampfire
Container.Overview: Vampfire is a self-hosted, privacy-first, lightweight alternative to Discord built on top of Campfire. Features include real-time text chat, voice/video calls via LiveKit, screen sharing, voice notes, direct messages, file attachments, search, Web Push notifications, @mentions, and bot integrations. Requires Redis and LiveKit containers to be running.
Container.Description: Vampfire is a self-hosted, privacy-first, lightweight alternative to Discord built on top of Campfire. Features include real-time text chat, voice/video calls via LiveKit, screen sharing, voice notes, direct messages, file attachments, search, Web Push notifications, @mentions, and bot integrations. Requires Redis and LiveKit containers to be running.

Config.Name: Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage for database, uploads, and configuration

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY_BASE
Config.Description: Rails secret key base. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 64

Config.Name: REDIS_URL
Config.Description: Redis connection URL. Point to your Redis container.

Config.Name: LIVEKIT_URL
Config.Description: LiveKit server WebSocket URL. Point to your LiveKit container.

Config.Name: LIVEKIT_API_KEY
Config.Description: LiveKit API key. Must match the key configured in your LiveKit container.

Config.Name: LIVEKIT_SECRET
Config.Description: LiveKit API secret. Must match the secret configured in your LiveKit container.

Config.Name: DISABLE_SSL
Config.Description: Set to true to serve over plain HTTP. Use true if behind a reverse proxy handling SSL.

Config.Name: TURN_HOST
Config.Description: TURN server hostname for NAT traversal. Required for reliable voice/video on mobile networks. Example: turn.yourdomain.com

Config.Name: VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY
Config.Description: VAPID public key for Web Push notifications. Optional.

Config.Name: VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY
Config.Description: VAPID private key for Web Push notifications. Optional.
